title: Execution Model v2 — Phase 4: roadmap surfaces (tk roadmap, TUI, tickboard) and polish
description:
ROUGH SCOPE — flesh out into ticks when Phase 3 (zk7) closes. Spec: docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md §1 (tk changes), phasing row 4.

- tk roadmap: render the epic chain with status (done / active / queued) — tk graph at epic granularity.
- Roadmap views in TUI (internal/tui) and tickboard (internal/tickboard): epic-chain progress, badges for gated boundaries (--awaiting checkpoint / --requires approval). No new data model — derived from epic + blocked-by + awaiting. Tickboard is the priority surface (human monitoring during long autonomous runs).
- Base-branch as a first-class epic field (replacing the note convention from phase 3).
- Learnings-cap lint: warn when .tick/learnings.md exceeds 150 lines.
- Tickboard UI work follows CLAUDE.md rules: pnpm, ticks-* components, Catppuccin Mocha.
